title: Pyxidaria viscosa
taxonomy: Pyxidaria viscosa is classified as a species of fungus in the family Pyxidariaceae. This fungus belongs to the phylum Ascomycota, a group of sac fungi. It is a type of lichenicolous fungus, meaning it grows on lichens. The classification of Pyxidaria viscosa is further divided into the kingdom Fungi, the division Ascomycota, and the class Dothideomycetes. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification.
